mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dahua_department_cache (id, parent_id, name, memo, sort, parent_ids, department_sn, domain_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{memo}, #{sort}, #{parentIds}, #{departmentSn}, #{domainId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE parent_id = VALUES(parent_id), name = VALUES(name), memo = VALUES(memo), sort = VALUES(sort), parent_ids = VALUES(parent_ids), department_sn = VALUES(department_sn), domain_id = VALUES(domain_id)
